note: v387: New Time Clock section — a standalone punch clock. Clock In / Clock Out records a start and end timestamp; the duration is derived from the two, so it stays accurate even when the phone sleeps between punches (nothing runs in the background). An open punch survives reload as the 'clocked in' state with a live elapsed timer. Manual add/edit of entries, a per-entry hourly rate (defaulting to a rate set on the page), From/To filtering with running totals, and an option to bill selected entries onto a new invoice (one line each: hours × rate). Hideable like other modules in Settings.
